title: tigridia pavonia
intro: Tigridia pavonia, also known as the Mexican shell flower, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tigridia pavonia include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for various methods of consumption and application.
